population: Adults with haemorrhoidal symptoms; children, pregnancy, postpartum, inflammatory bowel disease, infection, immunocompromise, malignancy, anticoagulation, and severe active bleeding require tailored pathways.
intended_setting: Primary-care documentation and follow-up as qualified by the exact source and clinical context.
